zh.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol是Guy de Bailleul和Dionysia的女兒，於大約1103年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德莫普斯。她於1125年與William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair在英國諾圖波藍德米特福德米特福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1136年在英國諾圖波藍德米特福德享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol是Guy de Bailleul和Dionysia的女儿，于大约1103年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德莫普斯。她于1125年与William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair在英国諾圖波藍德米特福德米特福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1136年在英国諾圖波藍德米特福德享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德米特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol was born about 1103, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Guy de Bailleul and Dionysia. She married William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair in 1125, in Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1136, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol est née environ 1103, à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Guy de Bailleul et Dionysia. Elle a épousé William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair en 1125, à Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1136, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol wurde um 1103 in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Guy de Bailleul und Dionysia geboren. Sie hat 1125 in Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, England William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1136 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Mitford, Northumberland, England und wurde in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol è nata il circa 1103 nel Morpeth, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Guy de Bailleul e Dionysia. Lei sposato William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair nel 1125, nel Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1136, nel Mitford, Northumberland, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Mitford, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliolは約1103年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスでGuy de BailleulとDionysiaの娘として生まれた。1125年にイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードミトフォードでWilliam Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1136年にイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol(은)는 대략 1103년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 Guy de Bailleul(와)과 Dionysia의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1125년 영국 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드 미트퍼드에서 William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1136년 영국 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol nasceu aproximadamente 1103, em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Guy de Bailleul e Dionysia. Ela casou-se com William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair em 1125, em Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1136, em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol родилась около 1103 г. в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Guy de Bailleul и Dionysia. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair в 1125 г. в местности митфорд, митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1136 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Hawise Balliol nació aproximadamente 1103, en Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Guy de Bailleul y Dionysia. Se casó con William Bertram 2nd Baron of Mitford, the fair en 1125, en Mitford, Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1136, en Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
